Darius.trading_pattern: Poke from range in mini form and never let him stick to you. His bleed denies your passive regen window between forms. Trade with boomerang poke then disengage.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: Darius Q — stay outside the full ring or hug him; the outer ring is the most dangerous part. Use Hop (E) to escape after poking.

power_spikes.you: Mega Gnar form with walls nearby, Trinity Force + Black Cleaver
power_spikes.enemy: Level 5 (full bleed stacks), Stridebreaker first item

Darius.early_game: Poke safely from range in mini form. Never let him grab you with E. His bleed prevents your regen between forms so kite perpetually.
Darius.mid_game: Match his shove with wave clear. Your Mega form can punish his engage attempts if you GNAR! him into a wall.
Darius.late_game: Your GNAR! into a wall is fight-winning in teamfights. Avoid side laning vs him 1v1 — you lose that duel.
Darius.win_condition: Poke him down from range and threaten Mega form all-ins near walls. Build Black Cleaver to shred his armor during Mega form.
Darius.scaling: Darius wins 1v1; Gnar better in teamfights via GNAR! utility
Darius.positioning: Keep max range in mini form at all times. Never stand near walls unless YOU are in Mega form initiating.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Abuse his mana early with Fleet Footwork autos and Q poke. Force him to use spells for CSing. He doesn't have sustain. Win on Mega form timings with Black Cleaver.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: Malphite Q (Seismic Shard) — sidestep it; losing the movement speed from it is a big deal in mini form.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult engage), Sunfire + Randuin's Omen

Malphite.early_game: Poke his mana down. He struggles without mana to sustain through your harass. Hit level 6 healthy and threaten Mega form.
Malphite.mid_game: He wants to roam for ult engages. Push fast and counter-rotate. Your GNAR! can match his ult as an initiator.
Malphite.late_game: Both of you want to be the engage tool. He's better in closed spaces, you're better when you can GNAR! into walls.
Malphite.win_condition: Drain his mana early, get ahead, build Black Cleaver to shred him in Mega form. Deny him roam pressure by pushing.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales via ult teamfight; Gnar even in laning
Malphite.positioning: Sidestep his Q poke. Keep lane pressure to prevent roaming. Don't fight near walls when you're in mini form.

Irelia.trading_pattern: She dashes through you at max passive stacks. Only fight her at 0-2 stacks. In mini form she destroys you — save Hop for escape when she engages.
Irelia.ability_to_dodge: Irelia E (Flawless Duet) — sidestep the two blades. If both hit it's a stun and you lose the trade badly.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 5 (full passive stacks), Trinity Force first item

Irelia.early_game: She bullies you early. Use Hop to escape her all-ins. Farm safely and avoid giving her passive stacks from minions.
Irelia.mid_game: She outduels you in both forms once Trinity is up. Shove and rotate — avoid prolonged 1v1s.
Irelia.late_game: She's dangerous on carries. Your GNAR! can peel for your team if you land it on her.
Irelia.win_condition: Survive laning phase with CS lead. Play for teamfights where your GNAR! has more impact than her split push.
Irelia.scaling: Irelia outscales in duels; Gnar better in 5v5
Irelia.positioning: Never stand between her two E blades. Hop away from her engage immediately — don't try to out-trade her in mini form.

Renekton.trading_pattern: He bullies you especially in Mega form — you can't kite him well when slow. In mini form, use range to poke and Hop to escape his E engage.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: Renekton W (Ruthless Predator) — when he uses E to gap close, immediately Hop backwards to escape the stun.

power_spikes.you: Mega Gnar form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 3 (full combo), Black Cleaver + Plated Steelcaps

Renekton.early_game: He dominates early. Poke from range and never commit to fights at levels 1-5. His burst shreds your HP before you can Mega.
Renekton.mid_game: He falls off mid-game relative to early. Match his shove and play for objectives. Your Mega form GNAR! can punish his engage.
Renekton.late_game: His late game isn't impressive. Group and let your GNAR! be the teamfight initiator.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive the early lane. Get jungle help. Once past level 10-12, his power fades and your teamfight matters more.
Renekton.scaling: Renekton favored early; Gnar better in teamfights late
Renekton.positioning: Keep range in mini form. When you see his E, Hop backwards immediately. Never stand still in his auto range.

Urgot.trading_pattern: His shotgun knees destroy mini Gnar in extended trades. Stay at max boomerang range and avoid his passive proc range. He wins most all-ins.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: Urgot E (Disdain) — don't position in front of him when his shield is up. His E grab leads to a full kill combo.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult execute), Sunfire + Frozen Fist

Urgot.early_game: He out-ranges mini Gnar's effective fight range. Farm safely, poke with Q from max range. Avoid getting kneecapped.
Urgot.mid_game: He wins duels. Rotate and play for teamfights where your GNAR! has more value.
Urgot.late_game: His ult on carries is lethal. Your GNAR! into walls disrupts his team — land it on him before he can ult.
Urgot.win_condition: Play for macro and teamfighting. Avoid 1v1s in side lane. Get jungle help if forced to fight him.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot outscales in duels; Gnar better teamfight initiator
Urgot.positioning: Stay outside his passive knee range (roughly 490 units). Approach from angles where his knees aren't facing you.

Sett.trading_pattern: Poke him down in mini form. Don't engage in Mega form without your E jump available — you can't escape if he W's you. Trade then hop out.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: Sett W (Haymaker) — sidestep the center true damage. Hop away if he's about to throw it.

power_spikes.you: Mega form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult grab), Heartsteel + Hullbreaker

Sett.early_game: Even early. Poke with boomerang. He can't easily punish your range. Avoid his W grit explosions.
Sett.mid_game: He wins sustained duels. Match his shove and keep poke pressure in mini form.
Sett.late_game: Your GNAR! into a wall can flip teamfights as hard as his ult. Both have great engage tools.
Sett.win_condition: Poke him down before all-ins. In teamfights, GNAR! him into a wall before he can get his ult off.
Sett.scaling: Even throughout; Sett slightly better in 1v1, Gnar better in team engage
Sett.positioning: Maintain range in mini form. In Mega form, only engage if walls are nearby for a GNAR! bounce.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Poke from range in mini form and dodge his Q sweet spots. His kit is designed for melee trades — your range makes his Q harder to land.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: Aatrox Q — sidestep the outer edge hitboxes. The safe zone between the two Q zones is your friend.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 9 (Q max), Goredrinker + Eclipse

Aatrox.early_game: Your range advantage is huge here. Poke with Q and E autos. Don't let him land full Q combo in Mega form.
Aatrox.mid_game: He outduels you in melee range with Goredrinker. Keep range and poke. Match his shove.
Aatrox.late_game: His teamfight is good but your GNAR! into walls disrupts his combo. Peel and kite.
Aatrox.win_condition: Abuse your range early. Build lead before his items come online. Land GNAR! on him before he can ult.
Aatrox.scaling: Even early; Aatrox slightly better in duels mid-late
Aatrox.positioning: Stay at max range in mini form. Position between his Q hitboxes when forced to fight.

Jax.trading_pattern: Bully him pre-3 with range advantage. Once he has E, poke during his E cooldown. Never trade into active Counterstrike.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: Jax E (Counterstrike) — stop attacking when it's glowing. Poke with boomerang only during cooldown.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult passive), Trinity Force + Steelcaps

Jax.early_game: You win hard early with range. Poke him down and deny CS. Don't let him farm safely.
Jax.mid_game: He catches up with Trinity. Maintain range advantage and play for objectives.
Jax.late_game: He outduels in side lane. Group and play for teamfights via GNAR! utility.
Jax.win_condition: Snowball early range advantage into a kill. Keep him behind before Trinity Force spikes.
Jax.scaling: Gnar wins early; Jax outscales past first item
Jax.positioning: Stay at max range and poke freely. Don't auto him when his E is up.

Camille.trading_pattern: Your range advantage matters here. Poke from max range in mini form. When she uses E to engage, hop backwards and fight only if Mega form is available.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Camille E (Hookshot) — stay away from walls so she can't get clean angles. Pre-emptive Hop when she lines up an E.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 3 (full kit), Trinity Force first item

Camille.early_game: Range advantage makes this manageable early. Don't let her E-True Grit trade on you. Keep distance.
Camille.mid_game: Her ult isolates you in Mega form. Avoid fighting near walls — she flips the GNAR! wall advantage against you.
Camille.late_game: She dives carries. Your GNAR! can interrupt her dive if you land it on her.
Camille.win_condition: Poke her down and avoid isolated 1v1s. Never fight near walls in Mega form unless you're initiating.
Camille.scaling: Camille outscales in duels; Gnar better in open teamfights
Camille.positioning: Stay center of lane away from walls. Her Hookshot needs wall geometry — deny it.

Fiora.trading_pattern: In mini form you can poke but she can Riposte your boomerang. In Mega form she parries your moves. Trade carefully and don't commit when her W is available.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Fiora W (Riposte) — never commit full combo when W is up. Bait it out first with a basic attack then use boomerang.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 9 (Riposte CDR), Ravenous Hydra first item

Fiora.early_game: Mini form lets you poke safely. She can't easily engage on you. Maintain range and deny her Vitals.
Fiora.mid_game: She outduels you in melee. Avoid prolonged engagements in Mega form — she'll proc Vitals and heal off you.
Fiora.late_game: She dominates side lane. Group and use GNAR! for teamfight value.
Fiora.win_condition: Play for objectives and teamfights. Don't give her the extended 1v1 she wants. Use Ignite to cancel Vital healing.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora outscales in duels; Gnar better teamfight initiator
Fiora.positioning: Use range to avoid her Vitals. Reposition when a Vital spawns on the side facing you.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Deny every Q stack with boomerang poke. Your range is perfect for harassing him off CS. Make every Q last-hit cost him HP.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: Nasus W (Wither) — don't chase him when he activates it; you become slow enough that he can stick to you in Mega form.

power_spikes.enemy: 300+ Q stacks, Level 6 (ult), Frozen Heart + Hullbreaker

Nasus.early_game: Absolutely bully him. Hit him every time he walks up for Q stacks. Make laning painful for him.
Nasus.mid_game: He starts getting stacks despite your harassment. GNAR! him into walls when he tries to all-in.
Nasus.late_game: 500 stacks Nasus threatens even your Mega form. Avoid 1v1s late. Group and force objectives.
Nasus.win_condition: Deny as many Q stacks as possible. Win the game before 25 minutes. Your range makes his laning miserable.
Nasus.scaling: Gnar wins early-mid; Nasus becomes unkillable past 400 stacks
Nasus.positioning: Stand at max boomerang range between Nasus and the minion he's trying to last-hit with Q.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Poke from range before his passive shield activates. His kit needs melee range — your range makes his kit less effective. Kite his E slow.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: Mordekaiser R (Realm of Death) — if ult catches you, immediately Hop away and W in Mega form to survive. You can't Flash out once grabbed.

power_spikes.you: Mega form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult), Riftmaker first item

Mordekaiser.early_game: Your range dominates his melee trading style. Poke his passive shield down and harass with Q.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: His ult in Mega form is dangerous — you lose mobility when slow in Mega. Save Hop for ult escapes.
Mordekaiser.late_game: His ult isolates carries. In teamfights, kite and use GNAR! before he can ult.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Poke him down early and build lead. Build Grievous Wounds vs his Riftmaker healing. GNAR! him into a wall before he reaches your backline.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Even — Mordekaiser better 1v1, Gnar better teamfight initiator
Mordekaiser.positioning: Stay outside his E slow range. In Mega form, keep distance so his ult doesn't catch you at low mobility.

Tryndamere.trading_pattern: Poke him in mini form before he builds fury. He can't stick to you without E. His crits hurt in Mega form. Maintain range and avoid his spinning slash.
Tryndamere.ability_to_dodge: Tryndamere E (Spinning Slash) — hop perpendicular when he dashes so his E doesn't catch you in a straight line.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult unkillable), Phantom Drive + Mortal Reminder

Tryndamere.early_game: Bully him early with range. He has to walk up to CS. Poke freely.
Tryndamere.mid_game: His crits start hurting in mini form. Avoid extended fights.
Tryndamere.late_game: His ult makes him unkillable for 5 seconds. Never try to kill him during ult. In teamfights, GNAR! before his ult.
Tryndamere.win_condition: Poke heavy early and build a big lead. Push objectives when he's split pushing. GNAR! his all-in before he crits you down.
Tryndamere.scaling: Gnar wins early; Tryndamere outscales in 1v1 side lane
Tryndamere.positioning: Keep max boomerang range. Hop away when he uses E. Never fight near walls in mini form.

Sion.trading_pattern: Walk toward him when he charges Q to cancel it easily — your mobility makes dodging his kit simple. Poke with boomerang freely.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — move toward him to interrupt range, or hop sideways to avoid the knockup direction.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult roam), Sunfire + Heartsteel passive HP stacks

Sion.early_game: You have complete lane dominance. Harass him off every CS. His immobility means you can poke freely.
Sion.mid_game: His ult roams are dangerous. Push and take plates when he roams. Match with teleport.
Sion.late_game: His HP becomes massive. Your GNAR! execute threat on low-HP enemies is great. Use ult when he's out of position.
Sion.win_condition: Dominate laning, get plates and early dragon/rift. He'll fall behind if you deny HP stacks.
Sion.scaling: Gnar wins early; Sion tankier late but weaker teamfighter vs GNAR!
Sion.positioning: Stay at max range and poke. Move toward him when Q charges to minimize its effective range.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Stay mobile to avoid his E mark and Maiden harassment. Poke with boomerang and hop away from his ghoul zones. Never fight surrounded by tentacles/ghouls.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: Yorick E (Mourning Mist) — sidestep the slow projectile; being marked causes Maiden and ghouls to prioritize you.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (Maiden summon), Hullbreaker + Sunfire

Yorick.early_game: You out-range him and can poke freely before Maiden. Kill his ghouls with AoE to deny his mist charges.
Yorick.mid_game: Maiden makes him dangerous. Avoid fighting with Maiden nearby. Match his split push or he takes towers.
Yorick.late_game: He's a better split pusher. Group and GNAR! for teamfight value while he pushes.
Yorick.win_condition: Deny Maiden by killing ghouls and dodging E. Build a big enough lead that his split push can't outpace your teamfight pressure.
Yorick.scaling: Gnar wins early; Yorick outscales via split push
Yorick.positioning: Move laterally to dodge E. Don't let ghouls surround you. Hop away when Maiden is active.

Olaf.trading_pattern: Your range is your only advantage. Poke with boomerang but his axes hurt even at range. In Mega form he ignores slows so you can't kite him effectively.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: Olaf Q (Undertow) — dodge the throw and watch where it lands. He has to walk to retrieve it — punish that walk.

power_spikes.you: Mega form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult CC immunity), Stridebreaker first item

Olaf.early_game: Risky poke lane. He throws axes and they deal more damage at low HP. Farm safely and avoid his all-in levels.
Olaf.mid_game: His ult makes him ignore your Mega form slows. Avoid 1v1s after level 6.
Olaf.late_game: He ignores your Mega form slow entirely during ult. GNAR! him before he activates ult in teamfights.
Olaf.win_condition: Need jungle help. Try to GNAR! him into walls before he activates his ult. Land GNAR! first = fight won.
Olaf.scaling: Olaf favored throughout during his ult window
Olaf.positioning: Stay at max range. When he throws Q at an angle away from him, punish his retrieve walk with a boomerang + autos.

Riven.trading_pattern: Poke from range in mini form. When her shield (E) is down, she's vulnerable. Hop away from her Q3 knockup. Your range denies her from trading freely.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Riven Q3 (Blade of the Exile) — move sideways between each Q cast to make her Q3 knockup unreliable.

power_spikes.you: Mega form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 9 (max CDR), Ravenous Hydra + Black Cleaver

Riven.early_game: Range advantage is huge. Poke her while she goes for CS. She needs to E to shield before trading.
Riven.mid_game: She outduels at full items. Maintain range and play for teamfights.
Riven.late_game: Her execute ult timing on carries is dangerous. GNAR! her before she can full combo your backline.
Riven.win_condition: Bully early and maintain CS lead. Use Mega form GNAR! to lock her down before her burst sequence.
Riven.scaling: Even early; Riven outscales in duels
Riven.positioning: Move sideways between her Q casts. Hop away immediately when she uses Q3.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: Your range advantage is key. Poke with boomerang while he CS's. He can windwall your boomerang but it's on a long CD. Engage in Mega form when windwall is used.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: Yasuo W (Wind Wall) — throw boomerang after he uses it, not before. In Mega form, your GNAR! is unstoppable by Wind Wall.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult air combo), IE + Kraken

Yasuo.early_game: You bully him with range. He can't freely CS. Poke every time he goes for a minion.
Yasuo.mid_game: His crits hurt in mini form. Avoid trading without Hop ready as his E can close the gap.
Yasuo.late_game: Windwall counters your boomerang poke. Time throws carefully. GNAR! works through Wind Wall.
Yasuo.win_condition: Snowball early range advantage. In teamfights, GNAR! him into a wall — your ult isn't blockable by Wind Wall.
Yasuo.scaling: Gnar wins early; Yasuo scales better with crits
Yasuo.positioning: Throw boomerang at angles where Wind Wall coverage is less effective. Approach from the side.

Yone.trading_pattern: Range poke is strong here. When he uses E (soul dash), he commits forward — trade then Hop back before he returns to his body for the bonus damage.
Yone.ability_to_dodge: Yone E (Soul Unbound) — when he dashes, Hop away. When he returns to his body, move away from where he'll land.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 6 (ult), Kraken Slayer + IE

Yone.early_game: Poke him freely with range advantage. His Q-chain poke hurts but your range outpaces his.
Yone.mid_game: His damage ramps. Keep range, avoid his full E-Q3 combo in mini form.
Yone.late_game: His ult can reach your whole team. GNAR! him before his ult channels. He's immobile during the ult cast.
Yone.win_condition: Poke early and snowball. In teamfights, GNAR! him mid-ult to interrupt or displace him.
Yone.scaling: Gnar wins early; Yone outscales in sustained fights
Yone.positioning: When he E dashes forward, Hop backwards. Position away from where his body stands so return damage misses.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Bully her pre-11 constantly. Both you and her are ranged but your all-in threat is way higher. Mega form all-ins at levels 3-6 are devastating.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Kayle E (Starfire Spellblade) — dodge the empowered auto range. Hop away when she winds up an E auto.

power_spikes.enemy: Level 11 (fully ranged), Nashor's Tooth + Rabadon's

Kayle.early_game: She can't fight you. All-in constantly. Your Mega form is a nightmare for pre-11 Kayle.
Kayle.mid_game: She's becoming ranged. Apply pressure and roam. Don't let her hit 11 with a lead.
Kayle.late_game: She's untouchable with ult and full range. Avoid direct duels. Your GNAR! can scatter her team though.
Kayle.win_condition: Kill her before level 6 and roam. If she hits 11 safely, the lane is lost — win elsewhere.
Kayle.scaling: Gnar wins early-mid; Kayle wins late
Kayle.positioning: Invade her space constantly early. Deny CS with Mega form threat. Stay on top of her pre-11.

Jayce.trading_pattern: He out-ranges mini Gnar in cannon form. Only fight when he's in hammer form. Hop to dodge his hammer knockback during melee all-ins.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: Jayce Q (Shock Blast) — dodge the arc shot in cannon form by sidestepping. In hammer form, dodge Q knockback by sidestepping.

power_spikes.you: Mega form near walls, Trinity Force
power_spikes.enemy: Level 7 (Q max cannon), Trinity Force first item

Jayce.early_game: He pokes you down from safe range. Farm with Doran's Shield. Call for jungle help.
Jayce.mid_game: His roams are strong. Push and counter-rotate. Mega form GNAR! can answer his engage.
Jayce.late_game: He falls off a bit. Group for teamfights where his poke damage is less impactful.
Jayce.win_condition: Survive laning. In teamfights, GNAR! him into a wall during his melee form when he engages.
Jayce.scaling: Jayce favored early-mid; Gnar better teamfight initiator
Jayce.positioning: Hug minion wave to reduce his cannon Q poke angle. Force him into hammer form to fight.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Both have range advantage games. She'll Silver Bolts you in Mega form for massive true damage. Keep fights short. Never stand near walls — she'll Condemn-stun you.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Vayne E (Condemn) — never stand near walls or she stuns you. In Mega form near walls GNAR! should always be YOUR initiation, not her condemn.

power_spikes.enemy: Guinsoo's Rageblade, Level 6 (stealth ult)

Vayne.early_game: You have all-in threat she doesn't. Force early trades and Mega form all-ins.
Vayne.mid_game: Her Silver Bolts melt your HP. Avoid extended fights. Short trades only.
Vayne.late_game: Her true damage counters both your forms. Avoid dueling her. In teamfights, GNAR! her if she dives.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early before Guinsoo's. If you can't, roam and win elsewhere. Avoid isolated 1v1s entirely after first item.
Vayne.positioning: Never stand near walls — she'll Condemn stun you into terrain. Keep center of lane.
